growth_records.strain: DSM7029 delta-glb.C21 (formerly Polyangium brachysporum DSM7029; epothilone gene cluster integrated via attP transposase)

yields.note: epothilone C/D elevated 89/128-fold vs unmodified strain; intracellular malonyl-CoA raised 20-fold (0.045 to 0.92 nmol/mg DCW)

growth_records.cite: Zheng Wentao et al. ReaL-MGE is a tool for enhanced multiplex genome engineering and application to malonyl-CoA anabolism. Nature Communications (2024). DOI:10.1038/s41467-024-54191-4. [PMC11557832]
growth_records.snippet: the highest epothilone C/D levels were (4.1/2.7 mg L-1) elevated by 89/128-fold compared to the unmodified... Malonyl-CoA levels in S. brevitalea DSM7029delta-glb.C21 were elevated 20-fold... (0.045 to 0.92 nmol mg-1 DCW).
growth_records.notes: CYMG is a complex medium; composition not stated in text (name only) -> medium_composition_stated false. Titers are endpoint (mg/L), NOT rates; no biomass/time normalization possible. Intracellular malonyl-CoA 0.92 nmol/mg DCW is a pool, not secretion. No growth rate/uptake reported. A second-round strain (DSM7029delta-glb.21::lignocellulose, 29 edits) grew on lignocellulose (straw) as sole carbon source with epothilone C/D up 150-fold, but no absolute titer, growth rate, or lignocellulose uptake rate was given, so no separate quantitative record was created for it.

phenotypes.base_medium: Acid/gas-production test: peptone/complex base + substrate + pH indicator — positive = fermentative acid production, NOT growth on the substrate as a sole carbon source (interpret with care for model validation)
phenotypes.citation: BacDive strain 23375 (Reimer LC et al., BacDive 2022, NAR); https://bacdive.dsmz.de/strain/23375

phenotypes.base_medium: Sole-substrate growth / assimilation on a defined minimal medium (substrate as C/N/energy source) — positive = the organism grows on it
